sections.paragraph:
fut. יִשְׁמַן to be fat, to be fattened, Deu 32:15 Jer 5:28. (Arab. سمن id.)

Hiphil-

(1) to cover, to cover with fat, metaph. i.e. to cover over the heart as it were with fat, to render it callous so as not to heed the words of the prophet, Isa 6:10.

(2) to be fattened, pr. to make fat, to produce it from oneself, Neh 9:25.

Derivatives, שָׁמֵן-שְׁמַנִּים, אַשְׁמַנִּים, מִשְׁמָן, מַשְׁמַנִּים and pr.n. מִשְׁמַנָּה.

שמן

m. שְׁמֵנָה f. fat, Isa 30:23 used of a robust man, Jud. 3:29 (see מִשְׁמָן ); of a land, Num 13:20 of bread, Gen 49:20.
